name: @skill-map/web
description: skill-map.dev public site source. Static HTML + i18n; deployed via Caddy/Docker.

scripts.demo:build: npm --prefix .. run build --workspace=ui && node scripts/build-demo-dataset.js && cp -R ../ui/dist/ui/browser/. demo/ && node scripts/patch-demo-mode.js
scripts.docker: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:run
